case_title: DONNETTA C. STAFFORD VS. LESLIE GORDON KATZNELSON

docket_entries.description: ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAR-12-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
REPLY TO OSC RE: PROOF OF SERVICE: STATUS AND SETTING CONF STATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF STAFFORD, DONNETTA C.
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAY-29-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE; OBTAIN ANSWER OR ENTER DEFAULT. OSC TO PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY ROSS MCLAURAN MADDEN. THE APR-19-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF STAFFORD, DONNETTA C. AS TO DEFENDANT KATZNELSON, LESLIE GORDON SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED STATUS CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR          APR-19-2002 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-15-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT DUE ON       MAR-22-2002
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2002, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION FILED (SWEEP)
